summary: Backend testing for Doula Section Bug Fixes - All 11/11 tests PASSED. Verified: Dashboard stats API (active_clients count), Contract creation (no 422 errors), Invoice creation (works correctly), Contract quick edit PUT (works correctly), Client list shows connected clients.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Dashboard stats endpoint (/api/doula/dashboard) returns correct active_clients count. Logic correctly uses max(active_status_count, connected_clients_count) at line 3396
VERIFIED: Contract creation endpoint (/api/doula/contracts) works without 422 errors - ContractCreate Pydantic model correctly validates required fields
VERIFIED: Contract quick edit PUT endpoint (/api/doula/contracts/{id}) correctly updates contracts and recalculates remaining_balance when fees change (lines 3714-3749)
VERIFIED: Invoice creation endpoint (/api/doula/invoices) works correctly with InvoiceCreate Pydantic model (lines 4705-4750)
VERIFIED: Client list endpoint returns clients with linked_mom_id properly populated showing connected Moms
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Doula section backend APIs verified working. Double JSON.stringify bug was fixed in frontend (contracts.tsx and invoices.tsx). Test file /app/backend/tests/test_doula_bug_fixes.py can be used for regression testing.

backend_test_results.test_doula_login: PASSED - Doula can login and get session token
backend_test_results.test_dashboard_returns_correct_stats: PASSED - Dashboard returns all expected fields including correct active_clients count
backend_test_results.test_verify_test_client_exists: PASSED - Test client (client_5a266da7daed) exists and is accessible
backend_test_results.test_create_contract_success: PASSED - Contract creation returns 200 with contract_id, status=Draft, correct remaining_balance calculation
backend_test_results.test_contract_creation_does_not_422: PASSED - No 422 validation errors on contract creation
backend_test_results.test_contract_quick_edit_works: PASSED - PUT /doula/contracts/{id} updates successfully, remaining_balance recalculated
backend_test_results.test_create_invoice_success: PASSED - Invoice creation returns 200 with invoice_id, status=Draft
backend_test_results.test_invoice_creation_with_all_fields: PASSED - Invoice creation with all optional fields works
backend_test_results.test_get_contracts_list: PASSED - GET /doula/contracts returns list of contracts
backend_test_results.test_get_invoices_list: PASSED - GET /doula/invoices returns list of invoices

verified_api_endpoints.GET /api/doula/dashboard: WORKING - 200 OK, returns {total_clients, active_clients, pending_invoices, contracts_pending_signature, upcoming_appointments}
verified_api_endpoints.GET /api/doula/clients: WORKING - 200 OK, returns list of clients with linked_mom_id
verified_api_endpoints.POST /api/doula/contracts: WORKING - 200 OK, creates contract with auto-calculated remaining_balance
verified_api_endpoints.PUT /api/doula/contracts/{id}: WORKING - 200 OK, updates contract and regenerates contract_text
verified_api_endpoints.POST /api/doula/invoices: WORKING - 200 OK, creates invoice with auto-generated invoice_number if not provided
verified_api_endpoints.GET /api/doula/contracts: WORKING - 200 OK, returns list of contracts
verified_api_endpoints.GET /api/doula/invoices: WORKING - 200 OK, returns list of invoices
